use_cases: Primary call-to-action buttons in forms and landing pages
Destructive action triggers with visual warning styling
Secondary navigation actions with subtle outline styling
Icon-only buttons for compact toolbar interfaces
Ghost-style buttons for less prominent actions
ai_summary: A flexible button component with multiple variants (default, destructive, outline, secondary, ghost, link) and sizes for triggering actions across any interface. Built with Radix UI Slot for composition, class-variance-authority for variant management, and standard Tailwind focus/hover/disabled states. Fully accessible with ring focus indicators.
